message:
refactor: simplify DetectFormat by defaulting to TOON for non-JSON input

The previous heuristics for detecting TOON format (checking for ": " or
"[N]:" patterns) could incorrectly classify some edge cases. Since the
TOON decoder will fail gracefully on invalid input anyway, we can
simplify by just attempting TOON decode for anything that's not valid
JSON.

This removes fragile pattern matching and lets the actual parser handle
validation, following the "let it crash" philosophy for format detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
